schema.graphql

# Location of all your GraphQL files (relative to this config file's directory)
schema:
  - schema.graphql

# Location where the generated server code will be written
exec:
  filename: generated.go
  package: graphql

# Configuration for resolvers generated by gqlgen
resolver:
  filename: resolver.go
  package: graphql
  type: Resolver

# Location of the models
model:
  filename: models.go
  package: graphql

# DDx CLI Makefile

# Build variables
VERSION ?= $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty)
COMMIT ?= $(shell git rev-parse --short HEAD)
DATE ?= $(shell date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
LDFLAGS = -ldflags "-X main.version=${VERSION} -X main.commit=${COMMIT} -X main.date=${DATE}"

# Build directory
BUILD_DIR = build

# Platforms to build for
PLATFORMS = \
	darwin/amd64 \
	darwin/arm64 \
	linux/amd64 \
	linux/arm64 \
	windows/amd64

.PHONY: all build clean test lint deps help obsidian-migrate obsidian-validate obsidian-test obsidian-dry-run obsidian-nav obsidian-revert bead-schema skill-schema gendocs frontend-build frontend-rebuild frontend-verify copy-skills eval-skill bench-graphql

# Default target
all: clean deps test build

# Build SvelteKit frontend (required before Go build for //go:embed).
# Skip rebuild when no source file is newer than the last build output.
FRONTEND_SRC := $(shell find internal/server/frontend/src internal/server/frontend/static -type f 2>/dev/null)
FRONTEND_STAMP := internal/server/frontend/build/index.html

frontend-build: $(FRONTEND_STAMP)

$(FRONTEND_STAMP): $(FRONTEND_SRC) internal/server/frontend/package.json internal/server/frontend/svelte.config.js internal/server/frontend/vite.config.ts
	@echo "Building SvelteKit frontend..."
	cd internal/server/frontend && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run build
	@$(MAKE) --no-print-directory frontend-verify

# Force a frontend rebuild regardless of timestamps
frontend-rebuild:
	@echo "Rebuilding SvelteKit frontend (forced)..."
	cd internal/server/frontend && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run build
	@$(MAKE) --no-print-directory frontend-verify

# Verify the embedded frontend bundle is internally consistent: every
# /_app/* asset referenced by index.html must exist on disk. Catches the
# class of bug where index.html and the chunk dir get out of sync (partial
# build, file restore, manual edit) and go:embed silently bakes in a
# broken bundle that 404s every JS chunk to the SPA shell.
frontend-verify:
	@echo "Verifying embedded frontend bundle integrity..."
	@cd internal/server/frontend/build && \
	missing=0; \
	for ref in $$(grep -hoE '"/_app/[^"]+"' index.html | tr -d '"' | sort -u); do \
		path=".$$ref"; \
		if [ ! -f "$$path" ]; then \
			echo "  MISSING: $$ref"; \
			missing=$$((missing+1)); \
		fi; \
	done; \
	if [ $$missing -gt 0 ]; then \
		echo "frontend-verify: $$missing referenced asset(s) missing — run 'make frontend-rebuild'"; \

Author: Test User <test@example.com>
Date:   Fri May 1 00:34:08 2026 -0400

    feat(graph): one-click repair for missing deps and duplicate IDs [ddx-ce9905b7]
    
    Adds graphRepairIssue mutation with REMOVE_MISSING_DEP, APPLY_SUGGESTED_ID,
    and CLEAN_PATH_MAP strategies. Resolver validates path stays under project
    root, hashes the target file twice (with a test-only race hook in between)
    to detect concurrent writers, applies a structured YAML edit, and re-runs
    graph validation. Issues now expose a stable issueId derived from
    (kind, path, id, relatedPath) so the UI can pass them back to the mutation.
    
    The IntegrityPanel renders Preview fix / Apply fix actions for missing_dep
    and duplicate_id rows with an inline before/after diff. On success the page

data.text:
Committed. Bead complete:

- **AC1** mediaType wildcard: `resolver_artifacts.go` now matches `X/*` via `strings.HasPrefix` (test `TestArtifacts_MediaTypeWildcard`).
- **AC2** Frontend wired to server `search`: `+page.ts` passes `q` as `search`; `+page.svelte` removes client filter and navigates on input.
- **AC3** Sort enum + staleness arg added to `schema.graphql`; new `ArtifactSort` enum + helpers in `models.go`; arg/unmarshaller wiring in `generated.go`.
- **AC4** `(sortKey, id)` tie-breaker via `sortArtifacts` using `sort.SliceStable` with id fallback (test `TestArtifacts_SortByTitleStable`).
- **AC5** All `internal/server/graphql` tests green.
